CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B&M DIAMOND,INC.DBA BOBBY DIAMOND COMPLETE AUTO REPAIR DIAMOND, ROBERT POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: USED GARMAT DOWNDRAFT SPRAYBOOTH 24FT. LONG; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT RE: EQUIPMENT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $16,750.66 DAMAGES, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $368.45 COSTS, $279.38 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,398.49, PROPERTY MARKET VALUE OF $6000, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
